profile.name: Sung-jin Park
profile.bio:
Hi there, I'm Sung-jin Park! 👋
You can call me _Jin_.

I love exchanging ideas across disciplines — always open to connecting with people from diverse backgrounds.

publications.title: Rico: Build your own research homepage

projects.title: Rico
projects.description: Build and deploy a static page for researchers.

projects.title: FaceMouse
projects.description: It is a software that improves web accessibility for individuals with upper limb disabilities by controlling the mouse cursor through facial gaze direction.
